_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Create and/or maintain processes to ensure data management efforts comply with AI ethical principles.
reference_document_element_description: Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies covering quality, privacy, security, ethics, and responsible use.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-010 (SP, cosine: 0.665), AG-A-003 (AG, cosine: 0.648).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.2/10 (raw 0.722). Shared vocabulary: [ai, data]. DCWF-only terms [comply, create, efforts, ensure, ethical, maintain] vs WIDAI-only terms [communicate, covering, enforce, enterprise, establish, ethics] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.888, R=0.881). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.9%). "Create and/or maintain processes to ensure data management efforts comply with A" and "Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies coverin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.736 ≈ STS 0.722 (gap 0.014). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [ai, data]. DCWF-only: [comply, create, efforts, ensure, ethical, maintain]. WIDAI-only: [communicate, covering, enforce, enterprise, establish, ethics].
